tasks.label: ThemeKit: test
tasks.detail: Run the ThemeKit test suite (the main dev loop).

tasks.label: App: build (headless macOS)
tasks.detail: Build Chroma.app with xcodebuild — no Xcode GUI, signing off.
tasks.command: xcodebuild build -project Chroma/Chroma.xcodeproj -scheme Chroma -destination 'platform=macOS' -derivedDataPath DerivedData CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -quiet

tasks.label: App: build & run
tasks.detail: Build a signed Chroma.app into ./DerivedData and launch it.
tasks.command: xcodebuild build -project Chroma/Chroma.xcodeproj -scheme Chroma -destination 'platform=macOS' -derivedDataPath DerivedData -quiet && open DerivedData/Build/Products/Debug/Chroma.app
